ExecutionPacket.purpose: Implement the approved module without architectural drift.
ExecutionPacket.contract-excerpt: Planned module contract excerpt goes here.

assumptions.assumption-1: Approved plan and verification entries are stable context for this packet.
assumptions.assumption-2: Phase status, accepted negative outcomes, and pending step boundaries must not be modified by this packet.
assumptions.assumption-3: Tests and log markers referenced by verification entries are the source of truth for evidence.

stop-conditions.stop-condition-1: verification entry STATUS flips from passed to failed and cannot be restored within retry-budget.
stop-conditions.stop-condition-2: diff touches a module outside the declared write-scope.
stop-conditions.stop-condition-3: plan or graph drift detected by grace lint --profile autonomous.
stop-conditions.stop-condition-4: Phase-18 accepted negative terminal outcome or pending step boundary is violated.

retry-budget.escalation: Hand off to controller with FailurePacket when retry-budget is exhausted.

checkpoint-fields.field: Restate the assumptions accepted as stable context for this packet.
Canonical commands executed (lint, tests, refresh) with provenance.
Test names, log anchors, or metric values that satisfy the verification entry.
Concrete next step or explicit BLOCKED reason with handoff owner.

notes.note-1: Workers should only read more context when the packet is insufficient.

assumptions.assumption-1: Restate assumptions accepted as stable context for this checkpoint.

evidence.evidence-2: grace lint reports no structural errors.

CheckpointReport.next-action: Concrete next step or explicit BLOCKED reason with handoff owner.

handoff.context-summary: One paragraph summary of state, drift, and pending decisions.

FailurePacket.stop-condition-triggered: verification STATUS cannot be restored within retry-budget.
FailurePacket.suggested-next-action: Read the contract, inspect the divergent block, apply smallest safe fix, or hand off to controller.
